Item Name: LorAnn Oils Super Strength Flavoring - Used For Candy Making, Flavoring, Baking, Hard Candy, & Flavor Oils - Bold, Natural Flavors 4X Stronger Than Extracts - Cherry, Pack of 2, 0.125 fl oz
Bullet Point 1: Cherry Flavoring is a favorite for kids of all ages. Appropriate for use in chocolates and coatings. If you experience some thickening, add liquified coconut oil, or cocoa butter to thin/smooth (typical use is ¼ to ½ teaspoon per pound).
Bullet Point 2: 3-4X STRONGER THAN EXTRACTS: LorAnn Oils deliver flavors 3-4 times stronger than typical extracts, offering bold, concentrated taste in every drop.
Bullet Point 3: CANDY & BAKING FLAVORING: Used for baking, candy making, hard candy, gummies, and more for bold flavor in all your treats that won’t bake out.
Bullet Point 4: GLUTEN FREE & USA Made: Kosher, gluten-free, keto-friendly, and made in the USA.
Bullet Point 5: PROFESSIONAL QUALITY: Super Strength Flavorings are secret ingredients used by professionals in baking, hard candy, and gummies that give them that “bakery” taste!
Product Description: Quality - LorAnn a Family Tradition Since 1962
Value: 1.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium, professional-grade flavoring with 3-4X strength compared to extracts, indicating high potency and value per drop. Small 0.125 fl oz bottles suggest niche use, but 'super strength' positioning justifies premium pricing. Gluten-free and keto-friendly certifications appeal to health-conscious consumers. Pack of 2 offers slight bulk discount, but individual bottle size limits cost savings.

catalog_content:
Item Name: The Republic of Tea — HiCAF Gingermint Green Tea, 50 Tea Bags, High in Caffeine
Bullet Point 1: Gingermint Green Tea: Earthy ginger and cooling, aromatic mint add a zesty boost to green tea and help you weather even the busiest days. Bright and flavorful, this spicy green tea uplifts and recharges.
Bullet Point 2: HiCAF Tea Collection: We’ve intensified the caffeine content of this black tea by adding green tea extract and pure caffeine isolated from premium tea leaves. Caffeine and L-theanine (often credited with reducing stress) are natural components of tea providing a state of calm alertness we call “Tea Mind”. So get a jump on your day, clear the afternoon fog or plow through that all-nighter.
Bullet Point 3: Steeping Instructions: Simply heat fresh, filtered water to just short of boiling. Then pour 6 oz of water over a tea bag and steep for 1-3 minutes. Experiment to find your favored steeping time. Remove the tea bag and enjoy. After steeping, add the used tea bags to compost or soil — they make gardens happy.
Bullet Point 4: Ingredients: Green tea, ginger, spearmint, peppermint, green tea extract
Bullet Point 5: Join Our Revolution! At The Republic of Tea, we enrich people’s lives through great-tasting premium teas and herbs, education and innovation — emphasizing Sip by Sip Rather than Gulp by Gulp lifestyle.
Product Description: The Republic Of Tea's Hicaf Gingermint Green Tea Offers A Beautiful, Bright Color And An Even Bolder Flavor. The Cool Aspects Of The Spearmint And Peppermint Flavors Infuse Wonderfully With A Zesty Ginger, Creating A One Of A Kind Green Tea Brew. Featuring Ingredients From Germany, Pure Caffeine Is Isolated From Premium Tea Leaves And Added To Green Tea Extract For A Healthy, Flavorful Boost. With Twice The Amount Of Caffeine As Traditional Green Tea, Hicaf Gingermint Green Tea Is A Natural Way To Get More Energy Throughout Even Your Busiest Of Days. To Make This Gourmet Green Tea, Simply Heat Fresh Water Just Before A Boil, Pour Over Tea, And Steep For 1-3 Minutes With Tea Bags Or 2-4 Minutes With Full-Leaf Tea.
Value: 50.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium specialty tea brand with a focus on high-caffeine blends. Metal tin packaging and gourmet positioning indicate a mid-to-high price point. Flavor complexity and added caffeine extract suggest a niche, health-conscious audience willing to pay more for functional benefits. No organic or certification claims visible.
